summary: Diff adds a new responsive storefront UI structure (App layout, header/footer, several storefront sections/components, theme variables/CSS). However, it also introduces backend code despite “frontend-only” guidance, includes use of a purple/indigo accent in one component, and appears to add files that were specified as immutable. Several required pages/flows (product detail, cart, orders, notification behavior) cannot be fully verified from the provided truncated/omitted diff content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Avoid blue/purple as primary accents and keep theme aligned with a dark, performance/fitness aesthetic.
missing_requirements.reason: A purple/indigo accent is explicitly used for a visible badge, conflicting with the constraint to avoid blue/purple accents.

missing_requirements.requirement: Notification popup fits within 320px viewport and includes scroll locking and viewport-fit positioning; dismissible reliably (overlay tap and button).
missing_requirements.reason: Modal styling shows max width constraints, but the diff summary does not provide evidence of scroll-locking behavior or reliable overlay dismissal handling (depends on shadcn Dialog defaults and/or additional logic not shown).

hallucinated_features.description: Backend code added even though backend changes were stated as not required and changes should be kept in the frontend unless absolutely necessary.
hallucinated_features.reason: A new backend file is introduced without any storefront responsiveness requirement needing it.

hallucinated_features.description: Edits/additions to files declared immutable in the BuildRequest constraints (Internet Identity hook, actor hook, main entrypoint).
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff shows these paths being added/changed despite being listed as immutable; even if they are 'added' here, they conflict with the constraint not to modify those specific files/paths.
